Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: The course's analysis of the Setouchi Triennale as a cultural industry and sustainable tourism model directly relates to monitoring sustainable development impacts, aligning with Target 12.b.

Life on Land.reason: The syllabus provides no explicit or inferable connection to terrestrial ecosystems or biodiversity.
